task:
/home/user/Documents/thick.ply is a densely-packed ASCII PLY with 1500 points inside a 10x10x10 cube.

Subsample the cloud using the 'Space' (minimum-distance) method with a minimum distance large enough to thin the cloud to at least 80 but strictly fewer than 1500 points (e.g., a min distance around 1.0 unit). Export only the subsampled cloud as an ASCII PLY at /home/user/Documents/thick_thin.ply. Do not export the original 1500-point cloud.

verification.description: Point count strictly less than original 1500
